thread.title: Local lawmakers skeptical of "Trump-proof" special session | News | bakersfield.com
thread.title_full: Local lawmakers skeptical of "Trump-proof" special session | News | bakersfield.com

author: PETER SEGALL psegall@bakersfield.com
title: Local lawmakers skeptical of "Trump-proof" special session | News | bakersfield.com
text:
As election results were still coming in across the nation on Nov. 6, California Gov. Gavin Newsom called a special session of the state Legislature to help prepare the state to push back against the policies of the incoming administration of Donald Trump.
"The track record of the first Trump Administration, combined with statements made by President-Elect Trump on the campaign trail," Newsom's declaration said, "indicate the consequences of his presidency for California may be significant and immediate."
